shortFormVideo.hook: Most local lead loss happens before a buyer ever reaches your form.
shortFormVideo.script: Most Melbourne businesses think they have a website problem. On phones, it is usually a lead-path problem. The first screen has to say what you do, where you work, why someone should trust you, and what to do next. Then the page has to load fast and link into the right local SEO and conversion pages. EB28's newest brief breaks down the mobile fixes that stop qualified visitors from bouncing.
shortFormVideo.creativeBrief: Vertical 20-30 second explainer. Use a phone-screen walkthrough of the article, then cut to the Melbourne Web Studio quiz CTA. Keep branding simple and avoid any public phone contact.
